---
title: "Continuous_Exploration_GCC-VWC-SR"
author: "Kathy Condon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggtext)
library(ggh4x)
library(ggpattern)
library(data.table)
library(MuMIn)
library(scales)
library(performance)
library(googledrive)
```

```{r set file directories - local}
dir.create(file.path("deluge"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data","R_exports"))
dir.create(file.path("deluge","figures"))
```

```{r read in continuous files - choose 2 to refresh connection}
drive.files<-googledrive::drive_ls(googledrive::as_id("https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dmzGwkGC1Y4uWW8nLXDkhtB_4A4suyF3?usp=drive_link"))

cont.files<-c("GCC_filtered.csv","SR_filtered.csv","VWC_20cm_filtered.csv","deluge_characteristics_mergeable.csv")

## read in each file
for (i in cont.files){
  
file.name<-drive.files %>% 
  dplyr::filter(name == i) 

# if-else, to throw error if file name is incorrect or error would otherwise stop loop
if(nrow(file.name) == 1){
  googledrive::drive_download(file = file.name$id, 
                              overwrite = T,
                              path = file.path("deluge", 'data', i))
  
} else{
  message("File error - check name or if duplicated: ", i)
  }
}

```

```{r check files}
GCC<-read.csv("deluge/data/GCC_filtered.csv")
str(GCC)

VWC<-read.csv("deluge/data/VWC_20cm_filtered.csv")
str(VWC)

SR<-read.csv("deluge/data/SR_filtered.csv")
str(SR)

#### set up deluge characteristics data to merge with
del.info<-read.csv("deluge/data/deluge_characteristics_mergeable.csv")
view(del.info)
```

```{r fix rest of data for merge}
# dat<-GCC%>%
#   mutate(var=as.numeric(GCC))
# y.lab="GCC"
# view(GCC)

dat<-VWC%>%
  mutate(var=as.numeric(VWC))
y.lab="VWC (20cm)"

# dat<-SR%>%
#   mutate(var=as.numeric(efflux))
# y.lab="Efflux"

str(dat)

cleanup.dat<-dat%>%
  mutate(new.date=as.Date(date,format="%Y-%m-%d"),
         trt=factor(trt),
         Study_shorthand=factor(Study_shorthand))%>%
  mutate(year=year(new.date),
         mon=month(new.date))

str(cleanup.dat)

daily.avs<-cleanup.dat%>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand,new.date,year,trt)%>%
  filter(!is.na(var))%>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    plots.per.trt=n(),
    av=mean(var),
    sd=sd(var),
    SE=sd/sqrt(plots.per.trt))%>%
  mutate(trt_type=if_else(grepl("DEL",trt),"DEL","CON"))%>%
  mutate(Study_trt=paste(Study_shorthand,trt,sep=": "))

head(daily.avs,5)

merge.daily<-merge(daily.avs,del.info,by=c("Study_shorthand","year","trt"))
head(merge.daily,5)


daily<-merge.daily%>%
  mutate(doy.date=yday(new.date),
         del_start=as.Date(del_start,format="%m/%d/%y"),
         del_end=as.Date(del_end,format="%m/%d/%y"))%>%
  mutate(background=case_when(
    Study_shorthand %in% c("CCE","Tooley_DRE") & trt_type=="DEL" ~ str_remove(as.character(trt),"_DEL$"),
    Study_shorthand %in% c("CCE","Tooley_DRE") & trt_type=="CON"~as.character(trt)))

# view(daily)

# make columns side-by-side control (duplicated when needed) & deluge treatments
### split into control and deluge data frames
con_daily<-daily%>%
  filter(trt_type=="CON")%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,year,new.date,CON_type=Study_trt,CON_n=plots.per.trt,CON_av=av,CON_sd=sd,CON_SE=SE,doy.date,background)

del_daily<-daily%>%
  filter(trt_type=="DEL")%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,year,new.date,DEL_type=Study_trt,DEL_n=plots.per.trt,DEL_av=av,DEL_sd=sd,DEL_SE=SE,del_start,del_end,doy.date,background)

### merge to make a wide df (don't use pivot_wider b/c going to be hard to duplicate right and check NA's, etc.)
full.merge.wide<-merge(con_daily,del_daily,by=c("Study_shorthand","year","new.date","doy.date","background"),all=TRUE)
view(full.merge.wide)

### check missing dates that were not matched
full.merge.check<-full.merge.wide%>%
  filter(is.na(CON_av) | is.na(DEL_av))
full.merge.check

# CALCULATE WITHIN 20%
full.merge.wide<-full.merge.wide%>%
  mutate(perc_diff=((DEL_av-CON_av)/CON_av)*100)%>%
  mutate(del_response=case_when(
    perc_diff < -20 ~ "NEGATIVE",
    perc_diff >= 20 ~ "POSITIVE"))%>%
  select(Study_shorthand,year,new.date,del_start,del_end,doy.date,CON_type,DEL_type,CON_n,DEL_n,CON_av,DEL_av,perc_diff,del_response)

view(full.merge.wide)

```

```{r graphing deluges}
## graph 
ggplot(daily,aes(x=doy.date,y=av,group=trt,linetype=trt_type,color=Study_trt)) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=yday(del_start),xmax=yday(del_end),ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),color="lightblue",fill="lightblue",linetype="solid")+
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=av-SE, ymax=av+SE), width=0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~Study_shorthand+year,ncol=2) +
  # scale_x_date(date_labels="%b %d") +
  labs(
    x="Date",
    y=y.lab,
    linetype="Treatment")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position="bottom")

```

```{r monthly}



```
